acceptanceCriteria.AC2: PASS - Page fetches schema from GET /api/forms/:formId/schema on load.
acceptanceCriteria.AC3: PASS - Correct GOV.UK component mapping for text/textarea/date/number/radio/checkbox/select; number uses inputmode=numeric.
acceptanceCriteria.AC4: PASS - Form title renders as <h1> with GOV.UK heading styling.
acceptanceCriteria.AC5: PASS - Visible labels are present and associated (label[for]/id, plus fieldset/legend for grouped controls).
acceptanceCriteria.AC6: PASS - Required fields show '(required)' and are validated client-side on submit.
acceptanceCriteria.AC7: PASS - Missing required values show GOV.UK error summary with links and inline field errors.
acceptanceCriteria.AC8: PASS - Error summary links now move focus to relevant control (radio/checkbox/date/text verified).
acceptanceCriteria.AC9: PASS - Successful submit posts structured JSON to /api/forms/:formId/submit and creates FORM_SUBMITTED audit entries.
acceptanceCriteria.AC10: PASS - Confirmation page shows GOV.UK confirmation panel with reference number and 'Form submitted'.
acceptanceCriteria.AC11: PASS - Keyboard-only journey works (tab order, submit flow, no keyboard trap observed).
acceptanceCriteria.AC12: PASS - GOV.UK structure present: header, Beta phase banner, main content, footer.
acceptanceCriteria.AC13: PASS - Invalid formId produces GOV.UK-styled error page with clear failure message.
